content.en:
"Xuan Star Realm Snake Realm Spirit Method, I don't have a way to cultivate it now, I can only cultivate it after breaking through to the Eternal Realm God Realm. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And he was still very early from the Eternal Realm God Realm, and his current Eternal Dao Seed had only solidified one into two, which was already the effect of his Ruin Sun Solidification Technique, otherwise it would be impossible to solidify the Eternal Dao Seed to the realm of one into two so quickly.

Of course, the two realms he solidified were no longer comparable to those half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms that were solidified by ten percent, after all, his Eternal Dao Seed was really too powerful.

Therefore, if his Eternal Dao Seed is slightly solidified, the increase in strength will be very terrifying.

This is also the reason why he was able to pass the second round of the Xuanxing Holy Gate Inheritance Assessment.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to cultivate, using the Ruin Sun Solidification Technique and the White Pole Xuan Leaf to solidify his Eternal Dao Seed.

And his wife and children are also solidifying the eternal Dao seed, although the progress is not as fast as his, but it is not slow.

Time flies.

The human race of the Endless Realm and the Star Realm is getting stronger and stronger, and there are 25 endless human races coming out of the Void Realm and entering these two eternal realms.

this day.

Ye Tian was going to change the entrance of the Void Domain to the Endless Realm and set it up in the Endless Realm Terran Territory, so that it would be more convenient to enter and exit.

When necessary, he will even open this passage to allow the Terrans in the Void to come and go freely with the Terrans of the Endless Realm and the Star Realm.

And many Terrans can also return to the Void from the Endless Realm and the Star Realm.

Of course, now is not the best time, and he needs to wait for himself to become stronger.

"If you can, directly find more Eternal Decrees, directly re-select a region, and open up a large number of Eternal Kingdoms, only the Eternal Realms of the Human Race, and no other forces are allowed to enter. "

This is Ye Tian's plan.

It's just that the Eternal Decree is not easy to find, let alone get the strongest dozens of Eternal Decrees!

"Unless I can obtain the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone and enter the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain, I can obtain a large number of Eternal Decrees!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Eternal Dao Realm is very large, but the number of Eternal Decrees in other regions is very small and rare, and it will take a long time to hope to find one.

However, the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain is different, there are many Eternal Decrees there.

It's a pity that the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone is too rare.

At least, Ye Tian had never seen it, and he didn't know who had this kind of treasure.

If you don't have the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, you won't be able to find the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain at all.

Ye Tian's copy body has been staying in the Eternal Dao Realm, and after searching for a long time, he has not found the true domain of the Eternal Dao Realm, and it is very likely that there is another void there, so it is impossible to find it by blindly searching.

The only way is to find the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, and then use the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone to enter the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain.

"It's almost impossible to find the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone here in the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, why don't you go to the Lone Star Kingdom Alliance and try it?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Lone Star Realm Alliance.

Sky Star Pavilion.

Ye Tian came here again, and a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm from the Heavenly Star Pavilion entertained Ye Tian.

This half-step Eternal Realm God Realm recognized Ye Tian and was immediately very surprised.

Later, the god of the Xuanze realm returned and went to kill Ye Tian.

As a result, Ye Tian came here intact.

Could it be ......

This half-step Eternal Realm God Realm didn't dare to think about it.

"Excuse me, do you star have the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone?" Ye Tian asked.

"No!" the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm shook his head, "The best Eternal Dao Realm Stone is so precious, even if we have it, we will trade it out quickly, and we will hardly keep it in our hands!"

"So, where will it be?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Well...... this"

This half-step Eternal Realm God Realm hesitated, and didn't seem to want to say.

Ye Tian naturally knew that the other party didn't want to disclose information for free, so he said: "You can mention as much price as you want." "

"Six Eternal Fire Sands!"

The other party quoted.

The Sand of Eternal Fire is not only a treasure in the sea of eternal fire, but also a currency that can be traded.

As for six grains of Eternal Fire Sand, this price is very expensive.

Maybe for Ye Tian, this little thing is nothing, but just to buy a piece of information, this is too pitiful!

"Six grains of eternal fire sand, just one piece of information, too expensive!"

Ye Tian said dissatisfied.

The other party hurriedly said: "Lord Ye Tianguo, there is a reason why the price is expensive. This information from our Heavenly Star Pavilion can almost guarantee that you will have a high probability of obtaining the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone. "

"Okay, I bought this piece of information!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and six grains of eternal fire sand were thrown out.

This half-step Eternal Realm God Realm immediately smiled and put away the six Eternal Fire Sands, and revealed: "The best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, there is a place that is-Taitian Realm, Taitian Realm is a top force in our Lone Star Realm Alliance, with two Eternal Realm God Realms. Not long ago, they had obtained a top-grade Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, and they didn't use it. Moreover, they are also going to take the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, and want a half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm to rescue a half-step Eternal Realm 387 Divine Realm in their Taitian Realm, if anyone does it, then they will give the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone for free. If the Ye Heavenly Realm Lord could help them rescue that half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, then they would be able to obtain the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone one hundred percent. "

"I see!" Ye Tian frowned and said, "This news should be easy to find, but you have collected six grains of Eternal Fire Sand from me?"

"No, no, no, this news really won't spread, Lord Ye Tianguo, you are not a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm of the Lone Star Realm Alliance, there is a high probability that you don't know this information, after all, only the top batch of half-step Eternal Realm Gods will receive the information of the Taitian Realm, and there is already a half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm ready to try, and that superb Eternal Dao Boundary Stone is very likely to be taken away by other half-step Eternal Realm God Realms. So, my piece of information is very valuable. "

Seeing that the other party said this, Ye Tian didn't say anything.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went straight to the Taitian Realm.

And after Ye Tian left, this half-step Eternal Realm God Realm of the Heavenly Star Pavilion contacted Bei Long Ze again, "What you want is the latest information of the Ye Tian Country Lord, an Eternal Fire Sand, do you want it?"

If Ye Tian knew that his information was immediately sold by the Heavenly Star Pavilion, he would definitely be speechless.

However, he doesn't take Beilongze seriously now, so he won't care.
